title: AI News Daily — July 24, 2026
summary: The White House's accusation that Moonshot AI illegally accessed banned Nvidia chips and distilled Anthropic's models to build Kimi K3 is today's biggest story — it lands alongside a new bipartisan bill that would let DHS pull the plug on dangerous AI systems, as OpenAI pushes ChatGPT into health data and Anthropic patches a sandbox escape in its coding agent.
